recv.ok: ok=7
recv.closed: err=q: channel closed
recv.cancelled: err=context canceled
recv.wrap.closed: err=recv: q: channel closed
recv.catch.closed: ok=99
recv.catch.cancelled: err=context canceled
await.ok: ok=42
await.timeout: err=context deadline exceeded
await.fail: err=boom
await.wrap.fail: err=await: boom
await.err.isTimedOut: true
